# ExtensibleSingleSignOn.ExtensionData

**Device Management Profile**

The additional data to pass to the app extension.

## Declaration

```swift
object ExtensibleSingleSignOn.ExtensionData
```

## Objects

- **ExtensibleSingleSignOn.PlatformSSO**: The dictionary to configure Platform SSO. Requires `Type` to be set to `Redirect`.

items.description: The dictionary to configure Platform SSO. Requires `Type` to be set to `Redirect`.
